meta.description: Maps which DFR drone platforms integrate with which CAD, dispatch, RTCC, and evidence management systems. Key paid report differentiator.

cad_systems.name: Axon Evidence
cad_systems.description: Cloud-based digital evidence management. Chain of custody from drone footage to evidence vault without manual transfer.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Critical for law enforcement — drone footage goes directly to evidence vault. Admissible in federal court without manual transfer step.
cad_systems.integration_notes: Skydio-Axon partnership is deep and purpose-built. R10 is DFR-native with Axon Evidence integration built in.

cad_systems.name: Fusus RTCC
cad_systems.description: Real-Time Crime Center platform — aggregates camera feeds, drone video, sensor data into unified ops dashboard.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Enables dispatchers and command staff to view live drone feed alongside other intelligence. Core RTCC integration for DFR.
cad_systems.integration_notes: Fusus acquired by Axon. Skydio integration enables live drone feed in RTCC alongside ALPR, camera, and CAD data.

cad_systems.name: Motorola PremierOne CAD
cad_systems.description: Enterprise CAD system used by hundreds of law enforcement agencies.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Primary dispatch system for many agencies. DFR integration means drone deployment can be triggered from or tracked within the CAD system.
cad_systems.integration_notes: Flock Safety's Flock911 integrates with PremierOne — enables 911 call to auto-trigger drone before human dispatch entry. Motorola Solutions also offers CommandBridge which has separate DFR integration pathway.

cad_systems.name: Motorola CommandBridge
cad_systems.description: Multi-agency coordination and situational awareness platform.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Multi-agency DFR coordination — share drone feeds across agencies in a mutual aid or regional DFR deployment.
cad_systems.integration_notes: CommandBridge has broader platform support than PremierOne native. API-based integration enables most modern DFR platforms.

cad_systems.name: ESRI Site Scan for ArcGIS
cad_systems.description: GIS-integrated drone data management and mapping platform.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Live drone position tracking on GIS map. Post-mission data processing. Particularly valuable for SAR, wildfire, disaster response where spatial data matters.
cad_systems.integration_notes: Strong for fire/SAR use cases. Less relevant for routine patrol DFR where real-time video feed is the primary output.

cad_systems.name: DroneSense
cad_systems.description: Purpose-built public safety drone fleet management and CAD integration platform. Vendor-agnostic.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Platform-agnostic fleet management. CAD integration supports multiple CAD systems. Best choice for agencies with mixed fleets or non-Skydio platforms.
cad_systems.integration_notes: Flying Lion uses DroneSense across its DFR programs. Works with Skydio, Parrot, Inspired Flight, and others. CAD integration is a core feature.

cad_systems.name: VOTIX
cad_systems.description: Drone ops platform with UTM and CAD integration for public safety.
cad_systems.dfr_value: UTM-integrated fleet management. Supports multi-agency coordination and airspace deconfliction — important for dense urban DFR deployments.

cad_systems.name: Flock911
cad_systems.description: First system in the US to auto-launch DFR drone on 911 call — before call is entered into dispatch.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Eliminates human latency in DFR dispatch. Drone launches the moment 911 call arrives. Scottsdale PD using this operationally.
cad_systems.integration_notes: Proprietary to Flock Safety ecosystem. Agencies adopting Flock Alpha get Flock911 as part of the package. Not compatible with other platforms.

cad_systems.name: Airspace Link
cad_systems.description: UAS Traffic Management and LAANC-enabled airspace authorization platform.
cad_systems.dfr_value: Automated airspace authorization for DFR flights. Reduces pilot workload for routine LAANC-eligible operations. BVLOS-capable with FAA approval.

cad_systems.name: CAL Analytics UTM
cad_systems.description: UTM software partner for Ohio DFR Pilot Program (ODOT).
cad_systems.dfr_value: State-level UTM integration. Used in Ohio statewide DFR program. Model for other state DFR program UTM requirements.
cad_systems.notes: Relevant primarily for agencies in Ohio DFR pilot or states that adopt similar structure.

platform_integration_matrix.description: Quick reference: which platforms integrate with which systems

BRINC Lemur 2.notes: Indoor tactical platform — CAD integration less relevant than comms/two-way audio

law_enforcement_primary.recommended_platform: Skydio R10 or X10D — deepest LE-native integration stack
law_enforcement_primary.notes: Chain of custody (Axon) is non-negotiable for federal prosecution cases

fire_sar_primary.recommended_platform: Skydio F10 or Parrot ANAFI USA
fire_sar_primary.notes: GIS mapping and thermal capability matter more than CAD integration for fire/SAR

mixed_agency_regional.recommended_approach: DroneSense as the integration layer — supports mixed fleets across agencies
mixed_agency_regional.notes: Multi-agency programs need vendor-agnostic software layer. DroneSense is the strongest option here.

911_speed_priority.notes: If fastest possible response is the primary metric, Flock911 auto-dispatch is the only native 911-triggered solution
